sigWerErrors.reason: 'anh' is a different pronoun from 'anna' (a name), which changes the addressee of the sentence. This alters the meaning significantly.
'anna' is a proper noun (a person's name), while 'nà' is not a name and does not refer to the same person. This changes the intended recipient of the message.
'mình' (I/me) is a pronoun referring to the speaker, while 'thì' is a conjunction/particle. This changes the structure and meaning of the sentence.
